programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nicole quiere recuperar a su novio, pero solamente si él termina su trío. Mesha ha estado enamorada del mejor amigo de su marido, Jamie, por cuatro años, pero no acepta un "No" como respuesta.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg le contará a su novia, Deidra, que trabaja en secreto como prostituto gay. El novio de Madrina sigue siendo infiel a ella con su ex. Después, Ro-Ro tiene dos novias y hoy la obligarán a elegir a una de ellas.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, tenemos a madres y padres muy enfadados en negación. ¡Estos hombres juran que es imposible que sean los padres de los hijos de estas mujeres! Pero, ¿y si tienen razón? ¿Qué respuestas darán los resultados de ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los invitados del episodio de hoy de MAURY tienen secretos que revelar, pero ¿se arrepentirán de contarlos? Hay relaciones en peligro. Puede que haya corazones rotos. ¿Podrán estas parejas sobrevivir a los secretos que amenazan con separarlos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, Marisol regresa por 12º vez para hacer la prueba de su 15º hombre. Luego, Dalyna vino a demostrar que Johnny Mack es el padre de su hijo. Él dice que es imposible porque le parece que el bebé es "demasiado feo" para ser suyo.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rhonda está segura de que John es el padre de su hijo. ¡Incluso la mamá de John está de acuerdo con ella! Después, Kim y Heather solían ser amigas, pero eso fue antes de que Rick la dejara por Heather. Sin embargo, Kim está segura de que Rick es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, te pondremos al día con algunos de nuestros invitados más emocionantes. Los resultados de paternidad asombraron a todo el mundo. ¿Qué pasó después de revelar las respuestas y que estos invitados retomaron sus vidas?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Mercedes recibe la noticia que el hijo que ella tanto a buscado es Patricio Rivera y entonces Mercedes llora desconsoladamente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se entera de que Luis Mario no se casará con Marybella, entonces habla con Luis Mario y él insiste en querer verla, pero ella continua negándose.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le dice telefónicamente a Luis Mario que cuando aparezca su hija se va a ir junto con Silvano muy lejos, a lo que Luis Mario responde muy molesto.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Estrella besa a Luis Mario pero él le dice que sinceramente ama a Rosaura y por nadie, ni por Estrella, va a dejar de seguirla queriendo. Estrella responde que lo comprende.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva se le aparece por la espalda a Luis Mario y lo ataca con un cuchillo. Él trata de defenderse y ruedan por el suelo, luego llega Luisana y Rosaura, quienes gritan para que Eva suelte a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Están operando a Luis Mario y todos están esperando el resultado. Gabriel llega preocupado y Eduarda comienza a pelear con todos por Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le cuenta a la policía como sucedieron las cosas con Luis Mario y Eva. Estrella Marina comienza a hacer hablar a Patricio sobre su madre y el habla sin saber que lo están grabando.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Carlos le cuenta toda la verdad de Angeliquita a Luis Mario. El Loro Verdoso y la Lora Azucena se ponen de acuerdo para ir a decirles a Mayrita y a Teobaldito donde está él y que vayan a salvarlo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario quiere hablar con Patricio pero Mercedes tiene miedo ya que los dos se odian. Camelia llama a Eva y le cuenta lo de la hija de Rosaura y Luis Mario y le dice donde está.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Griselda llama a Rosaura para decirle donde está su hija. Camelia trata de convencer a Patricio para que se vayan a Madrid. Él no acepta porque no se quiere alejar de Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura va a ver a Luis Mario y le dice que Carlos le informó que Patricio no lo mandó a matar. Mercedes les cuenta todo a Doña Cruz y a Claudia y se va a cuidar a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario, muy sorprendido, recibe en su habitación del hospital a Patricio, quien le dice que ahora que saben que son hermanos él jamás va a dejar de odiarlo y nunca le dejara el camino libre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eva se niega a entregarse a la policía y toma a Valeria de escudo. Después dispara contra la policía, hiriendo a uno de ellos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jacqueline le habla a Rosaura de todo el amor que siente por Silvano y de que va a luchar por ese amor ya que esta segura que Rosaura no lo ama como él ama ella.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard struggles to withstand the full force of the Marine onslaught. With the executioner's swords hovering above Ace's head, Straw Hat Luffy discovers a new ability!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard orders his men to help Luffy clear a path to the execution scaffold, but someone close to the Rubber-man rises to derail the rescue mission at the last second!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must defeat the man who taught him how to fight – his own grandfather – in order to save Ace. Battling his own flesh and blood won't be easy, but a waxy ally is there to provide backup!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is finally free from the execution scaffold! Luffy and his brother make a fearsome team as they blaze a path toward salvation. Ravaged by the war, Whitebeard wistfully commands his men to make the journey to the New World without him!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite Whitebeard's order to retreat, Ace is drawn back to the battlefield by the cruel taunts of a Marine adversary. Luffy watches in horror as his brother makes what could be his last stand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An eerie silence falls over the battlefield as Luffy and Ace share a heartbreaking final moment together. With his dying breath, Ace begs his brother to convey a message to his fellow pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Anguished cries echo across the battlefield in the wake of Ace's tragic death. Luffy – paralyzed by grief – must be carried to safety, but Whitebeard summons the strength for one last ferocious attack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard's children watch in horror as the old man faces off against the villainous Blackbeard pirates. Though his injuries are mounting and the odds are stacked against him, Whitebeard never runs away from a fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The world reacts to Whitebeard's death with shock and awe. Meanwhile, Jimbei risks his life to save Luffy. Blackbeard reveals the depraved depths of his nefarious nature!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Blackbeard and his men seek to sink Marineford, Jimbei and Luffy's desperate attempt to flee is thwarted by Akainu's fiery fists. The situation appears dire until a former enemy lends a sandy hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trafalgar Law and the Heart Pirates offer Luffy a submarine escape route. Blackbeard continues his reckless rampage, and a puny pink-haired marine changes the world with a scream!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Heart Pirates head for the bottom of the ocean as Trafalgar Law prepares to operate on Luffy and Jimbei. Meanwhile, the arrival of Shanks brings the bloodshed to a sudden halt!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The world rejoices in the wake of Whitebeard's death, and a host of powerful pirates vie for his position. Meanwhile, Luffy's friends fear that Ace's death may be more than the rubber-man can handle – if he ever wakes up!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Power-hungry pirates terrorize innocent citizens once protected by Whitebeard. Luffy's nightmarish awakening sends him on a reckless rampage that could land him in an early grave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One Piece X Toriko Crossover

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback to the younger days of Luffy and Ace reveals their unusual upbringing under the not-so-watchful eye of villainous mountain bandits!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The flashback continues as Ace robs a ruthless gang of pirates, and Luffy is left to take the fall! Will Ace and his friend Sabo let Luffy be tortured to death - or will they risk their high seas dreams to save him?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace and Sabo race to rescue Luffy from the clutches of a murderous gang of pirates! Sabo wants to grab Luffy and make a break for it, but Ace refuses to back down from a fight – even when he's outnumbered!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When a nobleman recognizes Sabo in the streets, Luffy and Ace learn the painful secret of their friend's past. As a sign of solidarity, the three boys pledge to become pirates and hoist a toast to brotherhood!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After another beating from Garp, Luffy and his friends take to the jungle and build a pirate hideout at the top of an enormous tree. First order of business: booby trap the new place!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his friends vow to defeat the giant tiger that's been stealing their food. Ace gets angry when his father's identity is revealed. Sabo's parents hire pirates to track down their son!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Ace, and Sabo take pirate lessons from a mysterious old scallywag who just might know the secret to defeat the big tiger – and becoming a good captain!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The brothers are captured by a gang of pirates, and Sabo is handed over to his noble father, where the boy quickly discovers a sinister plot to destroy Gray Terminal forever!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While flames spread across Gray Terminal, Sabo makes a desperate attempt to escape the trappings of his noble birth and save his brothers. Meanwhile, Luffy and Ace must fight to avoid an untimely end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is spared from a fiery death by an unlikely rescuer, but Ace refuses to leave Gray Terminal until he settles the score with Bluejam. Meanwhile, Sabo makes waves with a last-ditch escape attempt!

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: Sean Connery is back as James Bond, hired to prevent madmen from exploding a nuclear device near picturesque Nassau in this explosive thriller which earned an Oscar for its special visual effects.

programme.title: You Only Live Twice
programme.desc: Sean Connery stars as James Bond in this special-effects spectacular that takes him to Japan to foil an evil plot involving the onset of a nuclear war between the Russians and Americans.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Just as Agent 007 finally discovers true love, he is thrown into spectacular action and danger in this entertaining adventure that stars George Lazenby as the charismatic Bond.

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: Roger Moore's debut as James Bond takes him in pursuit of a voodoo- worshipping underworld drug czar who leads him from Harlem to New Orleans to the exotic Caribbean. Jane Seymour also stars.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Gun
programme.desc: After his life is threatened, Roger Moore as 007 is lured into a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with a million-dollar killer (Christopher Lee). Britt Ekland and Maud Adams co-star.

programme.title: Operación trueno
programme.desc: Las emociones no se detienen cuando James Bond se sumerge en esta implacable aventura llena de explosivas confrontaciones e increíbles secuencias de acción submarina.

programme.title: 007: solo se vive dos veces
programme.desc: Un desastre en el espacio lleva a la humanidad hacia la tercera Guerra Mundial y solo James Bond puede prevenirlo en esta magnífica, intempestiva y espectacular película.

programme.title: 007: los diamantes son eternos
programme.desc: ¡Una fortuna de diamantes robados pone a James Bond en acción nuevamente en esta emocionante aventura! Sean Connery regresa como el Agente 007 y hace equipo con la bella Tiffany Case.

programme.title: 007: el satánico doctor No
programme.desc: En esta película que dio inicio a la saga de James Bond, el Agente 007 (Sean Connery) lucha contra el misterioso Dr. No, un genio de la ciencia determinado a destruir el programa espacial de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Operación trueno
programme.desc: Las emociones no se detienen cuando James Bond se sumerge en esta implacable aventura llena de explosivas confrontaciones e increíbles secuencias de acción submarina.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Blood Diamond
programme.desc: Academy Award nominees Leonardo DiCaprio and Djimon Hounsou join Academy Award winner Jennifer Connelly in this action drama from Ed Zwick, the filmmaker behind The Last Samurai.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: A skilled thief (Leonardo DiCaprio) who enters people's dreams and steals their secrets gets a shot at redemption when he is given the dangerous task of planting an idea in someone's subconscious.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: Determined to prove his innocence in a double-cross, Bob Lee Swagger is now in a high-tension race from every law enforcement agency in the US and a shadowy organization that wants him dead.

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: In 2028, Los Angeles is in the midst of the most violent riot in its history. Four bank robbers botch a heist and head to the Hotel Artemis, a penthouse and an ER that exclusively serves criminals – all of whom now set their sights on the robbers.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Geena Davis stars with Samuel L. Jackson as a typical mother and schoolteacher with a past that's anything but typical -- only she can't remember it and it could come back to kill her in The Long Kiss Goodnight.

programme.title: Hyena Road
programme.desc: Three men, three different paths, caught in conflict but brought together to save lives: a highly skilled sniper who can’t think of his targets as human, an intelligence officer who has never killed while on duty.

programme.title: Snake Boss
programme.desc: Julia saves a karate school from a highly venomous visitor. Meanwhile, Johnny Bagpipes leaves his lady flying solo as he prepares to fly to Rome.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: On the rio Parana in northern Argentina, countless fishermen have been violently pulled into the water by unidentified creatures and some have even mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: Two eagles struggle to survive and produce offspring to maintain their species.

programme.title: China Wild
programme.desc: China has one tenth of the world's wetlands with the diversity types and various species.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: These creatures all utilise venom and poison to attack, defend and hunt, with devastating results.

programme.title: Superfish: Bluefin Tuna
programme.desc: Narrated by David Attenborough. It is a giant among fish, yet few have filmed it in the wild. Rick Rosenthal sets off to uncover the secrets of the legendary bluefin tuna, while documenting its place in the grand scheme of the vast marine ecosystem.

programme.title: Animal Armory
programme.desc: These creatures have evolved to incorporate spitting and stinging into their deadly arsenal for surviving in the wild.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Watch as the team encounters the king of the Savannah: the African lion!

programme.title: Life In A Tide Pool
programme.desc: Learn all about barnacles while exploring the tide pools at Crystal Cove State Park and visit the Cabrillo Marine Aquarium to learn how they grow and care for barnacles.

programme.title: Lionman: African Safari
programme.desc: In New Zealand, at The Kingdom of Zion Big Cat Sanctuary, Craig's focus has turned towards the tigers who are in need of help, and he must bury an old friend.

programme.title: Wild Menu
programme.desc: Insects... their number and diversity make them Earth's true masters.

programme.title: Wild Life: A Forest Between Two Worlds
programme.desc: From the placid wood grouse, to large herbivores like the chamois and the Spanish ibex, to dynamic predators like bears and wolves, this program chronicles life in the animal worlds of this lush and varied region.

programme.title: Shark Man With Riley Elliott: Riley's Blues
programme.desc: Riley Elliott is off to the Bay of Islands to attach the first of his high tech satellite transmitters for the season. He won't just be on the boat however, he plans to get into the water and hand feed the Blues.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Southwest China: China's Secret Garden
programme.desc: Tucked away in China's southwest corner is a hidden oasis unlike any other. Snow-capped mountains, temperate valleys and tropical jungles are home to a spectacular array of wildlife.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: A colony of elk in Burwash, on a former prison ground, is thriving. Researcher David McGeachy takes us out to see these majestic elk up close during mating season, when their explosive energy means you don’t quite know what to expect.

programme.title: Epic Animal Encounters
programme.desc: Tourist Ria Cilliers shares her morning coffee with a wild leopard.

programme.title: Wild Menu
programme.desc: The fruit of desire, forbidden fruit, passion fruit. Fruit is apparently something very desirable... and very appetizing.

programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.desc: A drug lord who pretends to overthrow the Mexican government. A corrupt FBI agent (Johnny Depp) who at that time, demands retribution from his worst enemy to carry out the drug lord's uprising against the government.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: Black Snake Moan
programme.desc: A God-fearing bluesman takes to a wild young woman who, as a victim of childhood sexual abuse, looks everywhere for love, never quite finding it.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City
programme.desc: In these intertwined tales, a universe of unlikely and reluctant heroes try to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

programme.title: Bats
programme.desc: Genetically mutated bats escape, and it's up to a bat expert and the local sheriff to stop them.

programme.title: I'm Gonna Git You Sucka
programme.desc: This ultra-hip Comedy in the tradition of The Naked Gun and Airplane stars Keenan Ivory Wayans in an Action Adventure filled with screwball gags and side-splitting one-liners.

programme.title: Clerks
programme.desc: The legendary indie film that launched the career of Kevin Smith and won over audiences with its raw energy, outrageous comedy, and a hip soundtrack. CLERKS features razor-sharp wit and the debut of pop-culture icons Jay and Silent Bob.

programme.title: Jay and Silent Bob Strike Back
programme.desc: The comic "Bluntman and Chronic" is adapted for the big-screen by Hollywood without the permission of the real-life stoner icons of CLERKS— Jay and Silent Bob.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: In 1965, America is at war with North Vietnam and Lt. Col. Hal Moore prepares his troops for one of the most violent battles in U.S. History: “The Valley of Death”.

programme.title: Tigerland
programme.desc: As a nation stands divided over the war in Vietnam, stark differences of opinion surface among the men of A-Company, triggering unexpected and far-reaching consequences.

programme.title: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: Jeremy Renner portrays the leader of a U.S. bomb-defusing squad in Iraq in this fierce tale of war. Winner of 6 Oscars including 2009's Best Picture and Best Director (Kathryn Bigelow).

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Airline pilot Whip Whitaker miraculously lands his plane after a mid-air catastrophe but questions arise as to who or what was really at fault.

programme.title: Hendrix (2000)
programme.desc: On stage, Jimi Hendrix (Wood Harris) electrified audiences with his powerful guitar playing and mesmerizing performances. But behind the scenes -- fueled by a dark haze of drugs and alcohol -- this rising star was on a crash course with destiny.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Hailed as a landmark film that dazzles with deep emotion and exceptional acting, PHILADELPHIA stars Tom Hanks and Denzel Washington as two competing lawyers who join forces to sue a prestigious law firm for AIDS discrimination. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Country House At Christmas
programme.desc: When it comes to Christmas food and entertaining, Britain's country houses have always put on a show.

programme.title: Classic Mary Berry
programme.desc: Celebrate the festive season with a dusting of Mary Berry’s very own Christmas magic.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Christmas Cookalong
programme.desc: Join Gordon for Christmas as he invites you into his family home on Christmas Day morning, sharing tips to prepare the tastiest Christmas Day menu, step by step. Gordon Ramsay’s Christmas Cookalong is guaranteed to make this the tastiest Christmas ever.

programme.title: Gordon’s Ultimate Christmas
programme.desc: Gordon prepares a spectacular set of Christmas dishes, including his recipe for the ultimate turkey, stuffing, perfectly cooked vegetables and a stunning Christmas dessert. If you follow Gordon's advice you can cook this for your friends and family.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: What should you do in a wild winter blizzard? Bake! Host Jessica McGovern makes sweet winter treats like an extravagant Gingerbread Chalet.

programme.title: Flour Power - Twists On The Classics
programme.desc: In a special filled with Gumdrop Cakes, Gingerbread Sticky Toffee Pudding, and an Eggnog Ski Slope Cake. Flour Power Christmas: Twists on the Classics, ensures your holiday treats will never be the same!

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Big Wow Desserts
programme.desc: From a decadent Chocolate Salted Caramel Yule Log to a whimsical Candy Cane Cake, host Jessica McGovern shows us how to celebrate a big holiday through big desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power Special - Edible Gifts
programme.desc: From crispy Brittle Bark to adorable Reindeer Cupcakes, Flour Power Christmas: Edible Gifts showcases delicious choices for a more personal present.

programme.title: Nadia's Family Feasts
programme.desc: Nadia Sawalha's celebrating Christmas with Alex Hollywood for a festive family feast, featuring Nadia's Hot Sausage and Cheddar Rolls, Ginger Gammon with Tartiflette, Turkey dinner and White Chocolate, Raspberry and Cranberry Brioche for pudding.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes.

programme.title: Christmas with Bonacini
programme.desc: Christmas with Bonacini is a charming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity chef Michael Bonacini and his son Oscar.

programme.title: Beautiful Baking with Juliet Sear
programme.desc: With Christmas fast approaching Juliet turns her attention to baking with children. She makes a Festive Reindeer Cake, a Gingerbread House Cake, A Candy Cane Cake, and Snowmen Cakes.

programme.title: Beautiful Baking with Juliet Sear
programme.desc: Today's Beautiful Bakes are all gifts for friends and family this Christmas. There are Rosemary & Parmesan Shortbreads, Charcoal Christmas Tree Crackers for cheese, mini Christmas Pudding Cake Pops, and a Build-Your-Own Gingerbread Wreath.

programme.title: Occult History of the Third Reich
programme.desc: By 1934, almost ten years after its creation, the SS was becoming a handpicked, disciplined, and fiercely loyal bodyguard of the Fuhrer and was being transformed into an Aryan Elite.

programme.title: Occult History of the Third Reich
programme.desc: Obsessed with the occult, leader of the SS Heinrich Himmler made it his goal to create a race of superhumans and embarked on the strangest eugenics experiment in history.

programme.title: Occult History of the Third Reich
programme.desc: In May 1933, Nazi students, Brownshirts and Hitler Youth burn works of literature, philosophy, and science by the thousands.

programme.title: Occult History of the Third Reich
programme.desc: The swastika was adopted by the Nazi Party in 1920, but it was neither the Party's invention nor its discovery.

programme.title: Occult History of the Third Reich
programme.desc: By 1934, almost ten years after its creation, the SS was becoming a handpicked, disciplined, and fiercely loyal bodyguard of the Fuhrer and was being transformed into an Aryan Elite.

programme.title: Occult History of the Third Reich
programme.desc: Obsessed with the occult, leader of the SS Heinrich Himmler made it his goal to create a race of superhumans and embarked on the strangest eugenics experiment in history.

programme.title: Occult History of the Third Reich
programme.desc: In May 1933, Nazi students, Brownshirts and Hitler Youth burn works of literature, philosophy, and science by the thousands.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Hitler, Himler, and the Occult
programme.desc: The link between Hitler, the esoteric mystical movement of the nineteenth century, and the Aryan mythology of the Waffen SS is finally established.

programme.title: The Vatican and the Third Reich
programme.desc: In the midst of WWII, Catholics looked to the pope to guide them. Hitler had already begun secretly launching his plan to exterminate the Jews of Europe.

programme.title: Vampire Skeletons
programme.desc: A new archaeological find reveals a disturbing truth behind the legend of the vampire. Were mutilated bodies in an ancient Irish grave associated with political terrorism or a ritual killing performed by a vampire?

programme.title: The Search For Dracula
programme.desc: Many historians and archaeologist today feel that there is much factual evidence as folklore that points to the possible existence of vampires. Filmed on location in Romania, Canada, and the United States.

programme.title: War on Witches
programme.desc: Discover how a single publication sparked a viral outbreak of witch-hunting, initially in Britain, and later spread across the world. Notably, it fueled the Salem witch trials which terrorized parts of the US a hundred years later.

programme.title: Inside The Tower of London: Crimes, Conspiracies, Confessions
programme.desc: Bishop Bonner, who tortured both Catholics and Protestants in the turbulent years following the reign of Henry VIII; why the Tower was constructed, why it was built, where it is, how it developed.

programme.title: Inside The Tower of London: Crimes, Conspiracies, Confessions
programme.desc: Alice Tankerville and her attempts to woo her way out of trouble with a prison guard; how Watt Tyler led the only force to storm the Tower; and how the legend grew that if you took the Tower you took the country.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Dublin residents Madeline and Hugh enlist the help of Maggie and Kieran to find them a house in Cork to escape the big smoke.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie and Kieran help young couple Tracey and Ultan find a house in Clare.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie tries to find houses for Dublin couple Ella and Conor who want to work remotely.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie ventures back to Tipperary where she shows Dubliner Helen a few places where she could expand her horizons.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie and Kieran head to Carlow to help find a forever home for civil servant Laura who wants to escape the rising costs of Dublin.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: We meet Cork social care worker Helen Conway who's hoping to get back to her country roots and leave the suburbs of Carrigtwohill.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie and Kieran help Greystones native Lisa who has just sold her Dublin apartment.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie and Kieran travel west to help Will and Joanna, a couple who have just returned to Ireland from working abroad.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie and Kieran travel north to help Colin and Lisa, a couple who are currently living in Beaumont with Lisa's mother.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie and Kieran travel to West Cork to help single mom Steffi, who is currently renting but wants a place of her own with her 14 year old son Cian.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie and Kieran meet couple Vik and Tom in Galway, as they hunt for a house in the county.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: Maggie and Kieran cover a lot of ground in Munster searching three counties for the right home for Limerick based nurse Laura.

programme.title: Pet Sematary (1989)
programme.desc: For most families, moving is a new beginning. But for the Creeds, it could be the beginning of the end. Because they've just moved in next door to a place that children built with broken dreams, the Pet Sematary.

programme.title: Pet Sematary Two
programme.desc: Antagonized by the neighbourhood kids, Jeff befriends outsider, Drew Gilbert, who lives in fear of his cruel stepfather Gus. After Gus shoots Drew's beloved dog, the boys bury the body in a place rumoured to have powers of resurrection.

programme.title: The Haunting
programme.desc: In this edge-of-your-seat supernatural thriller featuring Hollywood's hottest stars, a study in fear escalates into a heart-stopping nightmare for a professor and three subjects trapped in a mysterious mansion.

programme.title: Flatliners
programme.desc: Are you afraid to die? Kiefer Sutherland isn't. He's an ambitious, charismatic medical student who persuades classmates Julia Roberts and Kevin Bacon to take part in a reckless experiment. Rated: R

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers
programme.desc: After making a horrific discovery in the basement of a old church, Trish and her brother Darry watch their routine road trip home turn into a heart stopping race for their lives. They are now the chosen prey of a force that relentlessly pursues them.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: The Creeper terrorizes a group of varsity basketball players, cheerleaders and coaches who are stranded on a highway after their bus breaks down. Fighting their own fears and prejudices the group of athletes are forced to come together to stay alive.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future: the bottom half of a beautiful old duplex. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect.

programme.title: Envy
programme.desc: A man becomes increasingly jealous of his friend's newfound success.

programme.title: Orange County
programme.desc: Shaun is content to be a bright but unfocused surf slacker, until the day he discovers a novel by acclaimed author Martin Skinner. Inspired, he suddenly leaves behind Orange County to study creative writing Stanford University.

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: Boogie Nights
programme.desc: In this dark, comic drama, a gullible teenager takes a turbulent journey through the worlds of pornography, disco and fleeting stardom in the '70s, when drugs were in vogue, fashion was in flux and the party never seemed to stop.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: Based on a true story, two brothers, against all the odds, come together to train for a historic title bout that has the power to reunite their fractured family and give their hard-luck town what it's been waiting for: pride.

programme.title: The English Patient
programme.desc: Unforgettable and powerful, this winner of 9 Academy Awards, including Best Picture, Best Director (Anthony Minghella) and Best Supporting Actress (Juliette Binoche) unfolds an incredible tale of passion, intrigue, and adventure.

programme.title: Killer Mysteries
programme.desc: When a newly married woman is killed at home, police believe it’s a robbery gone wrong. But 20 years later, an LAPD officer opens the cold case file and sees the crime in a new way.

programme.title: Killer Mysteries
programme.desc: When four women are killed at different times in different states after going home from a bar with a handsome young man dressed as a cowboy, detectives don’t realize the murders are linked together.

programme.title: Killer Mysteries
programme.desc: A minister, his wife, and a mysterious suicide. When a wife and mother overdose in a small Texas town, almost no one suspects foul play.

programme.title: Killer Mysteries
programme.desc: Mother and son grifters crisscross the United States, pulling off every scam and con imaginable but when these criminal masterminds graduate to multiple homicides, they’re finally caught.

programme.title: Killer Mysteries
programme.desc: A promising young attorney is shot and killed in a jealous rage by an obsessed, on-again-off-again girlfriend. But can she convince the jury that she’s the victim and get away with murder?

programme.title: Killer Mysteries
programme.desc: The murder of a millionaire doctor’s wife sets off a massive manhunt throughout New England.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: Detective Rod Demery investigates the murder of his own mother.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A vicious shooting leaves three friends dead in Shreveport.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A man is shot dead by a pair of masked gunmen at a birthday party.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman is gunned down in broad daylight.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Former "Super Mom" to her three children, Diana has exchanged her apron for an alcohol and meth addiction and is unraveling her marriage, family and sense of self-respect.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: A family begging her to get help and two overdoses in the last two weeks don't phase 21-year-old Britney as she fearlessly shoots up suboxone and bath salts up to 30 times a day.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: Texas police must untangle a web of betrayal and lies to solve a murder.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A teenager's diary reveals the sordid secret behind her murder in Florida.

programme.desc: An Arkansas community is devastated when a family is found murdered.

programme.desc: An heiress's fiery relationship comes to a violent and shocking end.

programme.desc: German invasion of Denmark and Norway. The drive on Western Europe.

programme.desc: Operation Sea Lion. The struggle for Great Britain's skies.

programme.desc: North-African battles between the Axis and the Allied armies. Enters Rommel and his Afrika Korps. Greece. Crete and Malta.

programme.desc: After the naval battle in Midway the U.S.A. regain the leading drive of the war in the Pacific.

programme.desc: Invasion of Sicily. Mussolini's downfall. Ploesti. Invasion of the Italian Peninsula.

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Juana ha calmado a Rafael, cuando de pronto tocan a la puerta. Al abrir, descubren que se trata de Mauricio.

programme.title: Eva Luna

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Daniel descubre que Eva era la creadora del lema de la campaña de las manzanas y se va a casa de Marcela para buscarla e invitarla a asistir al evento.

programme.title: Eva Luna

programme.title: Eva Luna

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Armando acepta convertirse en capataz de la hacienda de la doña Úrsula Campos Miranda. Patricia no está de acuerdo con la decisión de su abuela porque no siente mucha simpatía por el nuevo capataz.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Aunque Armando le dice a Fedora que no sigan con su relación, acaban acostándose y deciden seguir siendo amantes. Armando le habla sobre su nuevo trabajo en la hacienda Campos Miranda.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Diego y Emperatriz permanecen náufragos en la isla, pero por suerte encuentran una cabaña para refugiarse. Sus discusiones siguen siendo constantes, hasta el punto que el muchacho golpea a la chica.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag. It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: New satellites are being launched to continue detailed observations of Earth and its oceans and ice caps. They are finding that climate change is accelerating and they have the data to prove it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: NASA's Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe's Solar probe Mission. No spacecraft has traveled so fast or so close to a star before. The hope is to reveal the source of the solar winds that affect Earth.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The commercial space flight companies are edging closer and closer to flight readiness. Paying customers will soon be launching into space; tourist revenue is projected to be a major stepping stone toward space exploration and colonization.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The ESA-JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch. The target is Mercury which has been too long neglected; this mission will shed new light on this strange world of light and dark.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zindy The Swamp Boy
programme.desc: Riding the end of the great Swamp Boy movie craze of the early 70s, Zindy the Swamp Boy effectively ended the genre. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zombie I Eat Your Skin
programme.desc: A more accurate title would have been I Occasionally Chop Off Heads With a Machete Because I'm The Voodoo Kind Of Zombie, Not The BRAAAAINS Kind. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary from RiffTrax.

programme.title: Rifftrax Live: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: Yes, horror classic House on Haunted Hill provides a mesmerizing walk down “people actually used to find this SCARY?!” lane. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with live commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Robo Vampire

programme.title: Yor, Hunter From The Future

programme.title: RiffTrax Short: Overcoming Fear
programme.desc: Fear: Most of us rejected it in the mid-90s by wearing trendy t-shirts emblazoned with slogans such as "Second Place is the First Loser.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Phantom Creeps
programme.desc: Bela Lugosi! An ugly robot! The power of invisibility! All of these and more are contained within The Phantom Creeps! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Shape of Things to Come

programme.desc: Un sospechoso crea un enorme problema cuando decide huir. Una mujer confiesa sus fallas arriesgando su matrimonio. Los agentes investigan a una sospechosa, pero la amiga termina detenida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Rodeado de oficiales, un pasajero se arriesga. Se enojan dos compañeras cuando una le da de comer huevos a su perro. Un oficial actúa rápido al ver un objeto peligroso en el asiento de un vehículo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un preso en libertad condicional escapa de la policía, pero se le acaba la suerte. Una pareja alega y los vecinos hablan a la policía. Un hombre desorientado tiene un accidente raro y culpa al clima.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una pistola taser se descarga en un sospechoso errático. Un delincuente intenta convencer a los detectives de que no lo vieron cometer ningún crimen. Un oficial supervisa una transacción absurda.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un principiante lamenta su delito y decisiones destructivas. Un conductor no creíble le dice a la policía que es víctima de un crimen. Un oficial anima a una chica con problemas a cambiar su vida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huyente inventa excusas para evitar la cárcel. Un conductor durmiéndose pide que la policía no le diga a su esposa. Una llamada de allanamiento causa un tormento en un vecindario.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente corre cuando oficiales lo ven en un lugar prohibido. Dos jóvenes se tardan en detener a un ladrón de bicicletas y llaman a la policía. Un problema domestico se complica malignamente.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre rebelde intenta despistar a los oficiales. Un conductor bien vestido quiebra barricadas. Los oficiales se sorprenden cuando una llamada doméstica da un giro inesperado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Viendo una buena oportunidad un sospechoso va a las carreras. Se atrapa a un hombre con objetos desagradables. Se atrapa a un hombre en una operación encubierta, aun así, no admite su crimen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía intenta atrapar a un sospechoso por robo de vehículo armado. La policía llega a una escena caótica y un testigo aclara las cosas. Un ciclista rezongón culpa su forma de ser en animé.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Alguien con un corazón roto maneja peligrosamente. Se atrapa a un miembro de la Asociación de padres y maestros dando un mal ejemplo. Seguir adelante es difícil para una mujer con un pasado malo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Es como una reunión cuando la policía alcanza a alguien que reconoce. La amante de un hombre hace problemas con la esposa. Los oficiales batallan con dos sospechosos que no dan respuestas concretas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado huye y la policía va muy cerca detrás de él. La policía persigue a una persona manejando nerviosamente. Un retén arriesga a un auto lleno de gente que tiene mucho que ocultar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales se ven obligados a usar guantes cuando detienen a un sospechoso asustado con una condición grave de la piel. Un futuro papá trata de correr. Un rapero empieza a cantar cuando lo esposan.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se somete a un hombre que está convencido que un animal salvaje lo sigue. Un cumpleaños se descontrola rápidamente cuando se involucran las armas. La policía ayuda con un problema domestico volátil.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un barrio tranquilo se interrumpe. Un hombre desafortunado trata de ocultar su culpabilidad al tirar unas prendas. Hay puñetazos cuando un dueño de tienda enfrenta a alguien que le robó.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía encuentra más que golosinas en el bolsillo de un sospechoso. Un conductor armado da un relato no creíble para justificar su arma. Una discusión termina con una llamada a Control Animal.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre llama a la policía cuando ve un robo en la licorería. Un conductor pierde a su amiga cuando le roba su camioneta. Los oficiales le sugieren a un joven que sea mejor ejemplo para su hermano.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía evita un allanamiento posiblemente mortal en una casa. Un pasajero tenso empieza a rezongar antes de que los oficiales digan una palabra. La policía busca la bicicleta robada de un joven.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales persiguen a un ciclista casi desnudo por todo el vecindario. Un sospechoso hace una serie de movimientos equivocados frente a su novia. La policía encuentra a una mujer en un armario.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor quiere regresar a casa para un cumpleaños. Un hombre teme confesar por qué sus huellas están en un arma. Un viaje para comprar comida de perro se convierte en un encuentro con la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor atrevido causa una persecución loca. Un pollero tiene una explicación poco clara de los objetos descubiertos en su carro. Un hombre impulsivo no reconocer sus errores fácilmente.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso que conduce ebrio dice que sólo salió a comprar un bocadillo. Una pareja se delata cuando la policía hace preguntas. La policía detiene a alguien que cree que se le tendió una trampa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta pelear con todo el vecindario. Un fugitivo está convencido de que la policía le dijo que se fuera en su bicicleta. Una mamá joven con problemas tiene una segunda oportunidad.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista causa una persecución por las calles. Ni un carro que no prende impide que un hombre corra de la policía. Un conductor no logra evadir a la policía y se disculpa raramente con su novia.

programme.title: George Carlin: Complaints & Grievances
programme.desc: In Complaints & Grievances, George Carlin’s 12th HBO comedy special, taped at the Beacon Theater in New York on November 17, 2001 (ten weeks after 9/11), Carlin casts his usual jaundiced eye on America and its inhabitants.

programme.title: George Carlin: Jammin' in New York
programme.desc: When George Carlin was asked which HBO concert was his favorite, his answer was always, “Jammin’ In New York.”

programme.title: George Carlin: Playin' With Your Head
programme.desc: George Carlin presents one of his most hysterical stand-up comedy performances in this one-man show recorded at the Beverly Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: George Carlin: You Are All Diseased
programme.desc: Growing up in New York City, George Carlin was always the class clown. He went on to become one of the great comedians of our time, with an appeal that has spanned generations.

programme.title: George Carlin: It's Bad for Ya
programme.desc: It’s Bad For Ya, Carlin's Emmy-nominated 14th and final HBO special from March of 2008 features Carlin's irreverent and unapologetic observations.

programme.title: George Carlin: On Location at USC
programme.desc: George Carlin’s March 5, 1977 standup concert at the University of Southern California showcases his unique role as America’s first counter-culture comedian.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence Presents: First Amendment Standup

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Nore Davis: You Guys are dope
programme.desc: Comedian Nore Davis brings down the house in his fresh new stand-up special, as he shares his take on social media dependence, being in love, and the hard truths of protesting, all with some a little help from his New York comedy crew.

programme.desc: Protect your right to laugh! Martin Lawrence presents today's hottest African-American stand up talent. Featuring comedians Jamie Teat, Shang, Lavelle Crawford, Deone Cole, and Berry Boys.

programme.desc: Ignoring the warnings of the Prophets, Sisko leads an invasion into Dominion territory.

programme.desc: The Doctor questions his decision to join the rebel holograms after they kidnap B'Elanna and kill two innocent organics.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager is sucked into an inescapable subspace void which is inhabited only by other trapped vessels battling each other for survival.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew has been abducted and brainwashed to serve as workers in a severely short-handed industrial alien society.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.desc: The Doctor publishes a holo-novel based on his Voyager experiences which scandalizes the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
programme.desc: Science is arround us every day. Astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson takes you from novice to knowledgeable, explaining how planes fly, what makes a rainbow, why hurricanes form, and the many other fascinating wonders that make up our world.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Bill Nye is joined by a co-host and former astronaut Mike Massimino to talk about funding space exploration.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Joining Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck as they discuss fusion reactors, nuclear bombs, spectroscopes and more.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Black holes, quasars, entropy and more with astrophysicist Matt O'Dowd.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: You have questions, they have responses. Renowned astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and other top science minds take on fan questions about life and the universe. Uncover a new mind-bending topic each season.

programme.title: StarTalk With Neil deGrasse Tyson
programme.desc: Astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and an extraordinary lineup of top field experts dive deep into unique realms of science. Join them for thought-provoking discussions about the theories, discoveries, and phenomena that matter most to us all.

programme.title: StarTalk: Down to a Science
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson teams up with notable experts to spotlight the most pressing topics that face society.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Having sustained an injury during an alien attack, Carter awakens to find herself abandoned on the Prometheus and trapped. With only her subconscious as a guide, Carter must find a way out of the nebula before it destroys the ship and her way home.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jonas Quinn returns to the SGC with news that Naquadria mines of Kelowna are not native to his world and are threatening to cause an explosion in the planet's core that will leave his home world uninhabitable and millions dead.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel experiences strange dreams centered around his possible knowledge of the Lost City of the Ancients. Suspicious that Daniel's mind is being manipulated, the team must find a way to help him while keeping the secret from the Goa'uld.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Carter flees from a super warrior with a piece of technology that may be the key to defeating Anubis's new army. Injured and unarmed, Carter must use all her training to stay alive, while O'Neill and Teal'c race to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When the Air Force sends a documentary crew to capture the historical importance of the Stargate program, the members of the SGC are resistant. Tensions rise when an emergency forces General Hammond to restrict the access they're given to the SGC.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Assigned the task of capturing the importance of the Stargate program, a documentary crew is given a true look at the heroic nature and family-like bond of the soldiers of Stargate Command, when a key member of the SGC is killed in action.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Col. Sheppard's team is urgently summoned to M1K-177, where Maj. Lorne's team has been attacked. When Sheppard and his unit arrive, however, all they find is a burned building containing charred bodies: presumably, Lorne and his men.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Lt. Kenmore wakes up in the infirmary without his memory. He begins to think there is something wrong when his nightmares about being a Wraith seem to be more than real. His fears would be unfounded if not for the serum that turns Wraiths humans.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and the team visits the planet Taranis at the invitation of two leading citizens, Dr. Norina Pero and Chancellor Lycus, who want McKay to repair a failing shield generator at an Ancient base, and Ancient warship, they've discovered.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Kenmore arrives back in Atlantis with a group of Wraith, in the midst of a civil war. Kenmore, hoping to leverage his knowledge of Atlantis against Sheppard and the team, suggests a trade; Beckett's serum, in exchange for keeping Atlantis hidden.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After their alliance with the Wraith backfires, the team must find a way to stop two Hive ships that are headed for Earth. Weir orders to attack and Sheppard is forced to rely on Michael to help him save McKay and Ronon, who are being held prisoners.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Successfully using the retrovirus to turn an entire hive ship of Wraith into humans the team returns to Atlantis with their prisoners in stasis. Weir continues to defend her leadership in the face of an independent review being conducted by the IOA.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team comes across a small village with a revered leader. Beckett soon becomes so enamored by his host he brings him to Atlantis. But soon, McKay discovers that Lucius is using some sort of pheromone to enchant those around him.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Exploring a village, the team is suddenly attacked and taken prisoner as Ronon had unknowingly lured the Wraith there. The villagers set Sheppard and Teyla free, who mobilize a strike force. When they return, the village has been devastated.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus steals the Repository of the ghosts' corporeal bodies, but not before Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde nab one body to share between them. Then it's up to Pac, Cyli and Spiral to get the Repository back from the Netherworld...

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus. Let the games begin!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: An ancient artifact once belonging to Pac's parent's leads to a temple within a maze that may hold the secret to the Tree of Life.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac fails his driver's license test because of a ridiculously strict Hovering Vehicles Department employee, Mr. Strickler. Then, to save Pac-World, Pac has to fly the Paccerchini into the Netherworld,

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: It looks like Betrayus' fortunes are changing when he summons a Nether-Witch to curse Pac Man with bad luck. The only catch is, the witch will only turn over the potion if Betrayus promises to marry her.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks lures a giant Ghosteroidto threaten PacWorld, and Pac-Man must grow to planet proportions to save the day. But who's gonna save Planet Pac from the repercussions of his enlargement?

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pinky is so jealous of Pac's friendship with Cyli, she tries to get rid of her rival.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Dr. Buttocks gets a map leading to the ancient, lost city of PacLantis, Pac, Cyli and Spiral voyage to the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The diabolical Dr. Buttocks clones an army of radio controlled prehistoric Pacasaursto attack Pacworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: In order to learn the secret location of the Repository, Betrayus possesses his mother's body while Dr.Buttocks hypnotizes the President.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When a super gigantic Robot invades Pacopolis, wielding a weapon that renders the power berries powerless, Pac-Man faces the ultimate challenge and nearly succumbs to doubts that without the berries he is not really a hero.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: There's a new threat to PacWorld, a debonair spy ghost named Specter. To stop him, Pac gets help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Apex, the Pointy-head alien, strikes a deal with the Netherworld to join forces and take over PacWorld, but Betrayus has no idea that the aliens are even more duplicitous than he is.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Thanks to the school bully, Pac-Man accidentally opens the portal to the Netherworld, unleashing an army of ghosts. Lucky for Pac-World, young Pac has the ability to eat the ghosts and burp out their eyeballs!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is under siege by ghosts and there is little Pac-Man can do about it without fresh berries from the Tree Of Life, which is hidden somewhere in the Netherworld and guarded not only by legions of ghosts, but fierce monsters!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.
